title: 7 Safe Dividend Stocks for Investors to Buy Right Now: June 2023
text: Although the idea of acquiring the highest-yielding enterprises seems lucrative, investors right now should arguably focus on safe dividend stocks to buy. These securities often undergird consistently profitable companies that enjoy revenue predictability.

title: Bunge (BG)-Viterra Merger to Create Global Agribusiness Company
text: Bunge's (BG) deal to buy Viterra will create an agribusiness giant, which is expected to result in $250 million of annual gross pre-tax operational synergies in the first three years.

title: 4 Agriculture - Products Stocks to Watch in a Challenging Industry
text: Despite the Agriculture - Products industry facing elevated input costs and supply chain issues, stocks like Bunge (BG), GrowGeneration (GRWG), Hydrofarm (HYFM) and Arcadia Biosciences (RKDA) are poised well to withstand the same.

title: Bunge boosts oilseed dominance, renewable diesel potential with Viterra deal
text: Bunge's planned acquisition of Viterra would make the world's biggest oilseed crusher even more dominant and secure a larger role in the expanding renewable diesel industry, although it may face competition hurdles.

title: Bunge: Getting Bigger And More Diverse But Still Sandbagging
text: Bunge buying Viterra from Glencore for $6.2 billion of stock, $2 billion of cash and assumption of $9.1 billion of net debt (paired with $9 billion of readily marketable inventories). The company is expecting $250 million of cost synergies on combined $5.4 billion adjusted EBITDA ($3.3 billion from Bunge and $2.1 billion from Viterra). Bunge will commence a $2 billion share buyback to be completed no later than 18 months deal closes, which should occur in 2024.

title: Bunge and Viterra to Merge in $18 Billion Agribusiness Deal
text: Bunge and Viterra agreed to merge in an $18 billion deal that will create an agribusiness giant valued at an estimated $34 billion.

title: Bunge, Viterra to merge to create global agribusiness giant
text: Bunge will buy Viterra for $8.2 billion. The acquisition will come alongside a $2 billion stock buyback and will merge ownership through a stock and cash deal.

title: CPI Comes in Lower Than Expected
text: CPI Comes in Lower Than Expected.

title: Bunge and Viterra to merge into $34B agribusiness giant
text: Bunge Ltd (NYSE:BG) has announced a deal to merge with Glencore PLC (LSE:GLEN) affiliate Viterra Limited in a stock and cash transaction that will create an agriculture giant. The merged company would be worth about $34 billion including debt, according to a Reuters report.

title: Canada Pension Plan Investment Board supports Bunge's purchase of Viterra
text: Canada Pension Plan Investment Board said it will receive a 12% position in the combined Viterra and Bunge and $800 million in cash in the agribusiness merger between the two companies announced earlier on Tuesday. CPP Investments has been a 40% owner of Viterra since 2016.

title: S&P Global upgrades Bunge after news of merger with Viterra
text: S&P Global Ratings upgraded Bunge Ltd. to BBB+ from BBB on Tuesday, after the grain and oilseed processor announced a merger with Vittera Ltd in a deal that includes a commitment to repurchase $2 billion of Bunge stock in the 18 months following the close.

title: Bunge, Viterra to merge in $18 billion deal
text: U.S. grains merchant Bunge and Glencore -backed Viterra on Tuesday announced an $18 billion deal including debt to merge, creating one of the world's largest agriculture trading firms.

title: Bunge to combine with Viterra in deal valued at about $8.2 billion
text: Bunge Ltd. BG, +0.18% said Tuesday it has agreed to combine with privately held Viterra Ltd. in a cash-and-stock deal valued at about $8.2 billion.

title: 3 Smart Stocks to Buy Now to Survive the Coming Recession
text: Although the latest jobs report suggests that an economic downturn might not materialize, the fine print suggests that investors should nevertheless prepare with recession-proof stocks to buy. To clarify, I'm not calling for an imminent collapse.

title: Archer-Daniels-Midland Or Bunge Limited? Choosing Between The Two
text: In this article, I provide a comparative analysis of Archer-Daniels-Midland and Bunge Limited to pick the ultimate agribusiness leader. ADM's business looks more stable and higher margin at first glance. However, this dominance of the "paper profit" of ADM continues until we turn to the cash flow statements. In terms of liquidity, BG seems a much more stable company at the moment. If the merger with Viterra goes through, I expect an enormous increase in shareholders' value.

title: Exclusive: Bunge finalizing $30 billion-plus merger with Viterra -sources
text: U.S. grains merchant Bunge Ltd is putting the final touches on a deal to merge with Glencore Plc -backed peer Viterra and create an agricultural trading giant worth more than $30 billion, including debt, people familiar with the matter said on Thursday.

title: 3 Cheap Retirement Stocks to Buy for June 2023
text: While the biggest and richest-premium commanding enterprises tend to attract attention for those seeking to hang up their cleats for good, investors can still find compelling bargains among cheap retirement stocks to buy. To be clear, I'm using “cheap” in the fundamental sense.

title: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in Bunge (BG) Stock?
text: Investors need to pay close attention to Bunge (BG) stock based on the movements in the options market lately.
